nasb.text: And whoever swears by heaven, swears both by the throne of God and by Him who sits upon it.

esv.text: And whoever swears by heaven swears by the throne of God and by him who sits upon it.

cnv.text: 指著天起誓的，就是指著　神的寶座和坐在寶座上的起誓。

ccb.text: 指着天发誓，就是指着上帝的宝座和坐在宝座上的那位发誓。

csbs.text: 指着天起誓的，就是指着神的宝座和坐在宝座上的那一位起誓。
